factor_code:
"""Alpha factor definition — the ONLY file the agent may edit."""
from __future__ import annotations
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

def compute_factor(symbols: list[str], as_of: pd.Timestamp, data: dict) -> dict[str, float]:
    """Weighted close position: volume-weighted (close-low)/(high-low) recent 20d."""
    results: dict[str, float] = {}
    for sym in symbols:
        try:
            bars = data["bars"].get(sym)
            if bars is None or bars.empty: continue
            b = bars.loc[:as_of]
            if len(b) < 20: continue
            b20 = b.iloc[-20:]
            h = b20["high"].values
            l = b20["low"].values
            c = b20["close"].values
            v = b20["volume"].values.astype(float)
            hl = h - l
            mask = hl > 1e-8
            if mask.sum() < 10: continue
            pos = (c[mask] - l[mask]) / hl[mask]
            w = v[mask] / v[mask].sum()
            results[sym] = float(np.sum(pos * w))
        except Exception: continue
    return results
